summary: Code updates: benchmark runner, batch inference, hard-negative training, review GUI improvements
V1.3 task definition migration, cross-review harness, stale doc remediation
Add annotation data: 82 cleaned GT + 21 reviewed prediction gpkg files
Sync Claude Code agent layer to repo: skills, rules, commands, hooks config
Small FP analysis framework, batch004 GT annotations, V4 HN strategy
Update README with project status, add daily log for FN analysis + SAM review
V4/V4.1 training pipeline, benchmark holdout, parallel inference, doc sync
Daily log 2026-04-05: V4/V4.1 training, benchmark, pipeline improvements
GT heater audit pipeline, PV classifier scaffold, daily log update
Add GEID workflow scripts (Codex) for Google Earth tile downloads
Refactor GEID exporter to support arbitrary grid IDs
Update README with Joburg cross-city pilot, training-data deficit, and GT heater audit findings
Add geid_reverse_engineering/: headless GEID 6.48 client + protocol writeup
Remove geid_reverse_engineering/ — moved to standalone sibling folder
Joburg GEID pipeline: stitch + chip mosaics for cloud inference
Fix GEID mosaic georeferencing (equirectangular, not bbox)
Cross-review harness multi-city refactor + pipeline redesign data layer (region_registry, annotation_loader, training_sets)
